channel.title: DockTile Updates
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates for DockTile.

item.title: Version 1.0.0
item.description:
DockTile 1.0.0-beta

  • Initial public beta release
  • Create multiple custom dock tiles with independent app lists
  • Customise icons with SF Symbols, emojis, and gradient colours
  • Grid and list layout modes for popovers
  • Ghost Mode and App Mode for dock integration
  • macOS Tahoe icon style support (Default, Dark, Clear, Tinted)
